game_info.title: Tumble Guys
game_info.concept:
Fall Guys is a free, cross-platform massively multiplayer party royale game. Clumsily compete in absurd obstacle courses with friends or build your very own chaotic course to share with the community. Steam URL: https://store.steampowered.com/app/1097150/Fall_Guys/ ================================================================================ Full Description: ================================================================================ Fall Guys is a free, cross-platform massively multiplayer party royale game. Clumsily compete in absurd obstacle courses with friends or build your very own chaotic course to share with the community.



You’re invited to dive and dodge your way to victory in the pantheon of clumsy. Rookie or pro? Solo or partied up? Fall Guys delivers ever-evolving, high-concentrated hilarity and fun. Prefer to be the maverick behind the mayhem? Build your very own obstacle course to share with friends or the wider community.

Create your own Course: Fall Guys Creative is a level editor that allows you to create fiendish custom Rounds and share them with the wider community.


Competitive & Cooperative: Tumble between competitive free-for-alls and cooperative challenges—or take on the Blunderdome with up to 3 friends!



Play with Friends: Fall Guys supports cross-play, cross-platform parties and cross-progression via your Epic Games Account.



Ever-Evolving Content: Play stays fresh with new collabs and game updates which bring new Costumes, Obstacles, and ways to play.



Gloriously Customizable: Choose from a multitude of Colors, Patterns, Costumes and Nameplates. Relish wins with extravagant Celebrations and share your flair with Emotes!

Items shown may require separate purchase from the in-game store and are subject to availability. Contains in-game purchases.
game_info.description: Tumble Guys is a chaotic 3D physics platformer where you control a clumsy bean-shaped contestant navigating a treacherous obstacle course floating in the sky. Your goal is to reach the finish line without falling into the void or getting knocked off by spinning hammers, sliding walls, and rolling boulders. Master the momentum-based movement, time your jumps, and use your dive ability to clear wide gaps.
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Keys / WASD: Move the character relative to the camera
- Space: Jump
- Shift: Dive (gives a forward burst of speed, useful for gaps)
- R: Restart the game (from Game Over screens)
- Enter: Start the game
- Esc: Pause / Unpause

TEST_1.strategy_description: Simulate holding the 'W' key (forward) for 2 seconds.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player's Z position decreases (moving forward into the screen) and velocity is non-zero. The test passes if displacement > 5 units.
TEST_1.strategy: Simulate holding the 'W' key (forward) for 2 seconds.
TEST_1.expected: The player's Z position decreases (moving forward into the screen) and velocity is non-zero. The test passes if displacement > 5 units.

TEST_2.strategy_description: Wait 0.5s, then simulate pressing 'Space' while standing still.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player's Y position increases significantly above the ground level (> 1.5 units) and then returns to ground level due to gravity.
TEST_2.strategy: Wait 0.5s, then simulate pressing 'Space' while standing still.
TEST_2.expected: The player's Y position increases significantly above the ground level (> 1.5 units) and then returns to ground level due to gravity.

TEST_3.strategy_description: Move forward for 0.5s, then press 'Shift' to trigger a dive.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The player receives a burst of horizontal velocity and the 'isDiving' state becomes true. Velocity magnitude exceeds normal walking speed.
TEST_3.strategy: Move forward for 0.5s, then press 'Shift' to trigger a dive.
TEST_3.expected: The player receives a burst of horizontal velocity and the 'isDiving' state becomes true. Velocity magnitude exceeds normal walking speed.

TEST_4.strategy_description: Walk off the edge of the starting platform to fall into the void (Y < -20).
TEST_4.expected_outcome: The player's position resets to the last checkpoint (start position) after falling below the kill plane.
TEST_4.strategy: Walk off the edge of the starting platform to fall into the void (Y < -20).
TEST_4.expected: The player's position resets to the last checkpoint (start position) after falling below the kill plane.

TEST_5.strategy_description: Move the player into the path of a known rotating hammer obstacle.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Upon collision, the player receives a high impulse force (knockback) changing their velocity vector abruptly.
TEST_5.strategy: Move the player into the path of a known rotating hammer obstacle.
TEST_5.expected: Upon collision, the player receives a high impulse force (knockback) changing their velocity vector abruptly.

TEST_6.strategy_description: Teleport the player near the finish line and simulate walking into the goal trigger volume.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: The game state changes to 'GAME_OVER_WIN' immediately upon entering the goal zone.

TEST_7.strategy_description: Use a heuristic AI to navigate the course: move towards the next checkpoint, jump if a gap is detected, wait if an obstacle is near.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: The AI successfully reaches the finish line, triggering the WIN state within a reasonable time limit.
TEST_7.strategy: Use a heuristic AI to navigate the course: move towards the next checkpoint, jump if a gap is detected, wait if an obstacle is near.
TEST_7.expected: The AI successfully reaches the finish line, triggering the WIN state within a reasonable time limit.
